description:
No spec subject — repo/CI configuration.

Observed 2026-07-22 shipping PR #3: neither the pull_request event (specs.yml has matching path filters) nor the push-to-main event triggered a Specs run; the repo's ENTIRE Actions history is workflow_dispatch only. All 4 CI runs for the 0.2.0 ship were manually dispatched. Until fixed, merges get zero automatic CI.

Check: repo Settings -> Actions (workflow permissions / allowed events), org-level Actions policy, and whether the workflow file on the default branch differs from expectations. Acceptance: opening a PR that touches lib/** produces an automatic Specs run.

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: specled_-dkh-ci-event-triggered-github (interactive implement session)
Log: interactive session, no delegated log file

Commit: 8e30724 (shared acceptance probe = PR #4 on branch specled_-y1c/ci-pr-base)
Files touched: .github/workflows/specs.yml (the y1c change; serves as this ticket's probe)
Tests added: none (CI/repo configuration ticket)
Verification stubs flipped: none (no spec subject)
Verification tier: live acceptance probe — opening PR #4 (touches .github/workflows/**, a filtered path) produced automatic pull_request-triggered Specs run 29968310586, the first event-triggered run in the repo's Actions history; run completed green after one rerun of the known-flaky tracer_test.exs:241 failure (tracked as specled_-epl, unrelated)
Final-tier runs: 1 (plus 1 rerun for the pre-existing specled_-epl flake)

Summary: Diagnosis ruled out every configurable cause: workflow file on origin/main has correct pull_request/push triggers with matching path filters (PR #3 touched lib/**, .spec/**, mix.exs), workflow state=active, Actions enabled with allowed_actions=all, and GitHub received the PushEvent/PullRequestEvent for PR #3 without creating runs. Root cause is the forked-repo workflow-registration state: runs are not created retroactively for PRs opened before the fork's workflows were (re)enabled — PR #3 predated that. Acceptance now observed: new PRs trigger automatically. Push-to-main leg to be confirmed when PR #4 merges.

title: CI: event-triggered GitHub Actions never fire (pull_request/push) — every run is manual workflow_dispatch
